compiled_state.title: [record-test-status]: --source-file merge preserves stale failures -> previously-failed tests not re-run when passing after fix
compiled_state.author: Worktree
compiled_state.description: Source: 58bb-2232 investigation (2026-04-24). The --source-file merge logic preserves stale failed entries from the previous test-gate-status file for tests not re-run in the current invocation. Workaround: use --restart. Proposed fix: add a warning when failing due to inherited (not new-run) failures, suggesting --restart to clear stale state.
